sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7658" key="a)na/trimma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάτριμμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n7658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-τριψις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.63</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
